issue.location: Method right column, Material Conversion and Evidence Gates opener
before_problem: Gate 1 split proxy 'similarity' as 'similar- / ity' and DINOv2 'similarity' as 'sim- / ilarity'.
Gate 2 split 'rendered' as 'ren- / dered' and 'Visual' as 'Vi- / sual'.
Gate 2 split the QA-bucket wording across 'target-visible PASS/WARN material- / shift'.
Gate 2 split later metric wording around 'target- / category' and 'pixel- / space'.
rejected_intermediate_problems: A first Gate 1 rewrite removed 'similarity' but introduced 'furni- / ture', 'pre- / serves', and 'con- / trolled'.
A material-channel rewrite briefly introduced 'met- / alness' and 'ConvertAs- / set'.
A later compact rewrite removed those splits but still introduced a short Gate 2 run of 'con- / tract', 'tar- / get', and 'un- / der'.
The accepted version avoids the targeted split cluster while leaving only normal ACL two-column hyphenation.

change_summary.summary: Shortened the Material Conversion and Gate 1/Gate 2 prose, replaced fragile compound wording with shorter terms, and kept the non-flattening, proxy-gate, VLM-contract, and claim-boundary meanings intact.

observations: The final page-3 right crop removes the targeted 'flat-/tening', 'metal-/lic', proxy 'similar-/ity', 'target-visible', 'material-/shift', 'target-/category', and 'pixel-/space' splits.
The accepted Gate 1 wording reports the same proxy gate as four Isaac Sim assets with PSNR, SSIM, LPIPS, CLIP, DINOv2, and headless load/render checks.
The accepted Gate 2 wording keeps the two-probe structured schema and box-inclusion diagnostic without promoting the result into a model leaderboard.
The final contact sheet remains 11 pages with no obvious float, table, or blank-page regression.

verification.command: python scan of paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log for overfull boxes, undefined references or citations, rerun warnings, multiply-defined labels, and lineno warnings

verification.result: ok true; title and abstract match metadata; abstract word count 168
